module: shared Asset Library / Import From Library (step re-use)
architectureNotes: There is NO standalone 'cumulation enable toggle', 'aggregate display', or 'display-rule settings' widget in the authoring DOM. Grepping config/config.js and index.html for 'cumulation' returns no UI (only math-library 'accumulate' tokens).
Internal Cumulation in QC is realised through the shared Asset Library / 'Import From Library' flow (#asset-library-popup) — re-using/duplicating a step from the SAME activity into the current one.
The 'Import From Library' TOC menu item is gated by ng-show="getProgramName()" — flag-gated; spec logs + returns gracefully when absent.

Library modal: search input[ng-model=assetLibInput]; activity rows tr[ng-repeat=(key, value) in assetLibraryList] (.selected-activity); preview .step-block (.selected); LOS chips .los-chip (.selectedLos / .disableInsert); Insert ng-click=addActivityFromLibrary() enabled only when an activity + at least one LOS are selected.

The cumulative score/LOS roll-up from child to parent steps is a Reader/Preview RUNTIME behaviour — all aggregation, teacher-vs-student report, persistence-after-reload and LOS-variant cases are DEFERRED.

Automatable authoring surface: import entry presence (flag-gated), library modal open, search (exact/partial/no-match), listing columns, step+LOS selection insert-gating, cancel, filters, and security.
